questions.prompt: I want to join the intramural soccer team.
questions.prompt_task_text: I want to join the intramural soccer team.
questions.answer: Do you know if the team still needs players?

questions.prompt: Did you ever find your lost umbrella?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did you ever find your lost umbrella?
questions.answer: No, someone probably grabbed it by mistake.

questions.prompt: Is the guest wifi working for you today?
questions.prompt_task_text: Is the guest wifi working for you today?
questions.answer: It cuts out whenever I sit outside.

questions.prompt: I had to skip the lab safety training.
questions.prompt_task_text: I had to skip the lab safety training.
questions.answer: Do you know if the makeup session was rescheduled?

questions.prompt: Have you cleared your overdue library fines yet?
questions.prompt_task_text: Have you cleared your overdue library fines yet?
questions.answer: Sorry, I haven't checked my account this week.

questions.prompt: Does the dorm kitchen close early on weekends?
questions.prompt_task_text: Does the dorm kitchen close early on weekends?
questions.answer: Apparently they've cut our kitchen hours since last week.

questions.prompt: Where do you usually practice your music?
questions.prompt_task_text: Where do you usually practice your music?
questions.answer: The studio that you showed me has a great piano.

questions.prompt: Is there anywhere to dry your laundry nearby?
questions.prompt_task_text: Is there anywhere to dry your laundry nearby?
questions.answer: You can use the basement dryers downstairs.

questions.prompt: Did you hear about our missed night class?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did you hear about our missed night class?
questions.answer: Someone said the lecture that we missed was recorded and posted online.

questions.prompt: The bike repair station disappeared from the quad.
questions.prompt_task_text: The bike repair station disappeared from the quad.
questions.answer: Someone was asking where the bike station went.
